title: Unique Umami Irish Potato Casserole
description: A comforting and savory Irish dish featuring caramelized sugar sauce and shio-koji cure, perfect for a sick day or special occasion. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is sure to delight your taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, caramelize the sugar over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Add the shio-koji to the caramelized sugar and stir to combine.
In a separate pan, sauté the onions, garlic, and celery in olive oil until tender.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked potato slices, sautéed mushroom mixture, and vegetable broth.
Pour the shio-koji sugar sauce over the potato mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
